name: apple
description: Apple ecosystem skills for Codex, sourced from OpenAI's iOS and macOS plugin examples.

interface.longDescription: Apple groups OpenAI's Build iOS Apps and Build macOS Apps skill workflows into SwiftUI, iOS, macOS, Build, and Performance scopes. The grouped skills cover App Intents, SwiftUI UI work, iOS simulator debugging, simulator previews, ETTrace profiling, memgraph leak checks, macOS AppKit interop, SwiftPM, signing, notarization, logging, test triage, and window management.
defaultPrompt: Use $swiftui to refine this SwiftUI feature.
Use $ios to debug this iOS simulator issue.
Use $macos to inspect this macOS app.
Use $build to triage this Apple project build.
Use $performance to investigate this Apple app performance issue.
